# Repo context: culture-engineers.nl

This is a Jekyll static site hosted on GitHub Pages. Posts live in `_posts/`
using standard Jekyll front matter (title, date, categories, tags).

Author: René van Osnabrugge — Consulting Director at Xebia, Engineering
culture focus, targeting executive readers (CIO/CDO/Chief of Transformation,
public sector, healthcare, education). Site positions him as a Technology &
Transformation Executive.

When generating or editing blog content:
- Audience is executives, not developers. Translate technical concepts into
  business stakes (cost, risk, talent, delivery speed) unless the post is
  explicitly tagged "practitioner".
- Always check `.github/instructions/blog-style.instructions.md` for voice rules.
- Never publish (git push) without explicit confirmation from René.
- Front matter template to follow: see `_posts/` for existing examples.

When generating helper scripts
- Always check the `./scripts` folder for existing helper scripts.
- Use powershell for new scripts unless specifically required otherwise. 
- Always update documentation in the script header and README.md if a new script is added.
